_comment: Wazuh Indexer Ingest Pipeline — Browser Privacy Monitor Phase 3
_description: Layer 2 protection: even if a raw value slips past endpoint redaction, this pipeline removes or masks high-risk fields at the indexer ingestion stage.
description: Browser Privacy Monitor - Sensitive Field Protection Pipeline

processors._comment: Remove fragment from url_redacted if present (fragments can carry tokens)
Hash any url_redacted that still contains a potential token (64-char hex or 32+ base64)

script.source: if (ctx.data != null && ctx.data.url_redacted != null) { def url = ctx.data.url_redacted; def tokenPattern = /[A-Za-z0-9+\/._~\-]{64,}/; if (tokenPattern.matcher(url).find()) { ctx.data.url_redacted = '[PIPELINE-MASKED: high-entropy value detected]'; ctx.data.pipeline_masked = true; } }

processors._comment: Ensure sensitive raw URL fields never get indexed — drop them if present
Ensure raw title fields never get indexed
Normalise risk_score to integer for range queries
Set a pipeline_processed flag for audit purposes

_install_instructions: Then reference in index template or use as default pipeline for wazuh-alerts-*
